revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ishigami Shrine (Q135194384)
| native_name = 石上神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ishigami Shrine (Q135194384)
| coordinates = {{coord|38.384608|141.176383}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ishigami Shrine'''|石上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11658590|ltq=Q11658590|qid=Q11658590|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 56
** P155: {{ill|Q135040012|ltq=Q135040012|qid=Q135040012|1=Futamatano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Kesemaohoshimano Shrine|lt=Kesemaohoshimano Shrine|qid=Q135040014|1=Kesemaohoshimano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q907389|ltq=Q907389|qid=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}}
* {{ill|Monou District, Miyagi|lt=Monou district|en|Monou District, Miyagi|ja|桃生郡|ko|모노군 (미야기현)|sr|Област Моноу|qid=Q6902060|1=Monou District, Miyagi}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|38.384608|141.176383}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182093
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135040013|ltq=Q135040013|qid=Q135040013|1=Ishikamino Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
